quality.description_clarity: Excellent. Clearly explains application time, cost (additional vials for larger creatures), and effect duration.
quality.formatting_notes: The internal reference to '[_etherealness_](#etherealness)' is noted but assumed to be correctly formatted for its intended target system/documentation.

mechanics.primary_effect: Grants the effect of the _etherealness_ spell for 1 hour.

application_cost.material_cost: One vial for Medium/Small, plus one additional vial per size category above Medium.

mechanics.size_scaling: Correctly accounts for size scaling for the spell effect application, which is a good mechanical detail.

analysis.archivist_recommendation: Data appears complete and consistent. No discrepancies noted between explicit fields and descriptive text.
